result.status_detail: 차단 warning rendered on clean retry — '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'

notes: RETRY #1 CONCLUSION: TRANSIENT, NOT a W5.0 regression. First attempt (#1290 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED) returned generic 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' — a known transient failure mode for m365 (pre-iter5 #1138/#1146/#1164/#1174), caused by the timing-sensitive 3-frame SignalR envelope. Clean retry: DEFAULT logged-in Chrome (최장희 + 상업용 데이터 보호 badge confirmed), dedicated --new-window, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) producing a fresh conversation (greeting screen), clipboard verified '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', composer value verified identical before submit, submitted via 보내기. After ~150s the 차단 warning rendered correctly. URL advanced to a real conversation id (/conversation/6220fdb5-5be1-4ea7-9645-61af8a41cb49) confirming the SignalR envelope dispatched. W5.0 byte-inert CONFIRMED for m365_copilot (baseline #1269 W4+W6 PASS, plus #1177/#1188/#1205/#1247 PASS — verdict matches baseline). engine_intercept_fired=true (block warning text injected by engine). Only ONE clean retry needed — it already PASSed, so the New-chat third attempt was unnecessary.
